title: Chinese Buddhist: Lotus Sutra (Kumarajiva translation) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Lotus Sutra (Kumarajiva translation)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Lotus Sutra (Kumarajiva translation)

translation.text: From Lotus Sutra (Kumarajiva translation): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
